transforms: Collected the Wikipedia list page through the MediaWiki API using local data-automation.
Compared sectioned list rows with Wikidata, internal directory review data, and maintainer review decisions.
Exported only directory-candidate seed records with approved public source IDs.
reviewNotes: Initial seed import. CC BY-SA attribution is retained through the source registry.
